claude.text:
```json
{
  "type": {
    "typeId": "expense",
    "displayName": "Expense",
    "displayNamePlural": "Expenses",
    "description": "A personal expense record with amount, category, date, and optional notes for monthly budgeting and tracking.",
    "examplePhrases": [
      "I spent $42 on groceries today",
      "Log a $15 transportation expense for yesterday",
      "Add a $200 utilities bill for this month",
      "Track a $60 dining expense on Friday"
    ],
    "attributes": [
      {
        "name": "title",
        "label": "Description",
        "valueType": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "amount",
        "label": "Amount",
        "valueType": "decimal",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "category",
        "label": "Category",
        "valueType": "enum",
        "required": true,
        "enumValues": [
          "Groceries",
          "Dining",
          "Transportation",
          "Utilities",
          "Housing",
          "Healthcare",
          "Entertainment",
          "Shopping",
          "Travel",
          "Education",
          "Subscriptions",
          "Personal Care",
          "Other"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "expenseDate",
        "label": "Date",
        "valueType": "date",
        "required": true,
        "defaultToNow": true
      },
      {
        "name": "paymentMethod",
        "label": "Payment Method",
        "valueType": "enum",
        "required": false,
        "enumValues": [
          "Cash",
          "Credit Card",
          "Debit Card",
          "Bank Transfer",
          "Digital Wallet",
          "Other"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "notes",
        "label": "Notes",
        "valueType": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "tags",
        "label": "Tags",
        "valueType": "tag",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "receipt",
        "label": "Receipt",
        "valueType": "attachment",
        "required": false
      }
    ],
    "relations": [],
    "presentation": {
      "archetype": "ledger",
      "primaryField": "title"
    }
  },
  "skill": {
    "skillId": "monthly-expense-breakdown",
    "displayName": "Monthly Expense Breakdown",
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "targetMonth",
        "valueType": "date",
        "source": "slot",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "today",
        "valueType": "date",
        "source": "system",
        "required": true
      }
    ],
    "reads": ["expense"],
    "writes": [],
    "steps": {
      "main": [
        {
          "step": "set",
          "var": "resolvedMonth",
          "value": "if(targetMonth != null, targetMonth, today)"
        },
        {
          "step": "read_many",
          "typeId": "expense",
          "filter": {
            "expenseDate": { "sameMonth": "resolvedMonth" }
          },
          "into": "monthExpenses"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "into": "totalMonthAmount"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "count",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "into": "totalMonthCount"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "avg",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "into": "avgExpenseAmount"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "max",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "into": "largestExpense"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "count_where",
          "field": "category",
          "equals": "Groceries",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "into": "countGroceries"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Groceries" },
          "into": "sumGroceries"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Dining" },
          "into": "sumDining"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Transportation" },
          "into": "sumTransportation"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Utilities" },
          "into": "sumUtilities"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Housing" },
          "into": "sumHousing"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Healthcare" },
          "into": "sumHealthcare"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Entertainment" },
          "into": "sumEntertainment"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Shopping" },
          "into": "sumShopping"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Travel" },
          "into": "sumTravel"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
          "field": "amount",
          "from": "monthExpenses",
          "where": { "category": "Education" },
          "into": "sumEducation"
        },
        {
          "step": "compute",
          "op": "sum",
